description: A Platform Security Engineer found plain-text credentials in the deployment manifest of the `backend-service` in the `customer-portal` namespace. Refactor the deployment to extract hardcoded secrets and configuration into properly decoupled Kubernetes Secrets and ConfigMaps using environment variable injection and volume mounting, following the audit ticket at `/home/ga/Desktop/security_audit_ticket.md`. Ensure the application successfully rolls out. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!
